brand.name: GK SupportIT
brand.slogan: In-home computer repair — Travel included everywhere in Ottawa.

deplacement.d: We come to your home anywhere in Ottawa, at no travel cost.

bilingue.d: Service in your language, French or English.

prix.d: Transparent rates, lower than the Ottawa average.

diagnostic.d: The diagnostic is free if you go ahead with the repair.

step1.d: By WhatsApp or through the form, in a few words.

step2.d: In Ottawa, at a time that suits you (evenings and weekends).

step3.d: Price agreed before the work starts. No surprises.

data.d: Backup before any risky operation. Your files stay yours.

prices.d: The price is agreed before we start. No bad surprises.

parts.d: Parts are billed at cost, with the receipt to prove it.
